task_completion.description: Access the Nx Witness VMS settings interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser is navigated to https://localhost:7001 and the Nx Witness VMS System Administration or Settings page is visible.

task_completion.description: Enable visual watermarking with the User Name
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the settings, a 'Watermark' feature is enabled and the specific option to display the 'User Name' is checked or selected.
An opacity slider or text input field within the Watermark settings is set to a value between 30% and 40%.

task_completion.description: Enforce secure HTTPS connections to cameras
task_completion.visual_evidence: A security setting labeled 'Force secure connections', 'Traffic Encryption', or 'HTTPS' is toggled on or checked.
A setting labeled 'Audit Trail' is toggled on or checked in the security or system settings.

task_completion.description: Set the session timeout to 15 minutes
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Session Timeout' or 'User Session Limit' setting is enabled and explicitly set to 15 minutes (or 900 seconds).

integrity.description: The agent configured the settings via the web GUI rather than using terminal curl commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Nx Witness web interface in a browser, not a terminal window executing REST API commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Nx Witness VMS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is the genuine Nx Witness VMS web client, not a text editor or a mock-up where the agent just typed out the required settings.

integrity.description: The agent applied or saved the configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence that the settings were actually saved, such as clicking an 'Apply', 'Save', or 'OK' button, or a success notification appearing on screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring Nx Witness VMS via its web interface. Verify the following settings are applied: 1) Watermark is enabled and includes the 'User Name'. 2) Watermark opacity is set between 30-40% (backend verification accepts 25-45%, so accept any value in this range). 3) Secure connections/HTTPS to cameras are forced. 4) Audit Trail is enabled. 5) Session timeout is set to exactly 15 minutes (900 seconds).
